_comment: PoC baseline stack (frozen branch feat/kg-memory-poc @ 9b9f680, in a git worktree). Adjust the worktree path on the 2 absolute paths below if you place it elsewhere. KG_PYTHON = base anaconda python (the 'revitmcp' conda env is node-only — no python.exe; verified 2026-05-18 base anaconda has networkx 3.3, satisfies kg_bridge/requirements.txt). 'command' is the ABSOLUTE conda node.exe (plain 'node' is NOT on the system PATH). Changing KG_PYTHON or command requires a Claude Code restart (MCP reconnect) to take effect.
